summary: Metrics stats histogram bucket overflow undercounts high latency requests
description: The latency histogram in src/metrics/stats.ts tracks overflow as a single counter with no bucket boundary information, so we cannot tell whether an overflow spike was requests at 2x the top bucket or 100x. Makes some incidents harder to size.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: This is by design today, Histogram.observe just increments overflow with no value retained. Not strictly a bug, more a gap, but filing it as one since it has bitten two incident investigations already.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: agreed it should at least track max observed value alongside the overflow count

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: Working on adding a running max to the overflow path, should be a small change. Not done yet, still testing against a synthetic load.
